proof: function[T0](x0: T0, x1: Option[T0], x2: Set[T0], x3: Bool) { Option.some[T0](x0) != x1 or x0 ∈ x2 = option_set_contains[T0](x2, x3, x1) }[T](value, Option.some(value), s, contains_none)
function[T0](x0: Set[T0], x1: Bool) { Set.new[Option[T0]](option_set_contains[T0](x0, x1)) = option_set[T0](x0, x1) }[T](s, contains_none)
function[T0](x0: T0 -> Bool, x1: T0) { x1 ∈ Set.new[T0](x0) = x0(x1) }[Option[T]](option_set_contains[T](s, contains_none), Option.some(value))
function[T0](x0: Set[T0], x1: Bool) { Set.new[Option[T0]](option_set_contains[T0](x0, x1)) = option_set[T0](x0, x1) }[T](s, contains_none)
function[T0](x0: Option[T0], x1: Set[T0], x2: Bool) { Option.none[T0] != x0 or option_set_contains[T0](x1, x2, x0) = x2 }[T](Option.none[T], s, contains_none)
function[T0](x0: T0 -> Bool, x1: T0) { x1 ∈ Set.new[T0](x0) = x0(x1) }[Option[T]](option_set_contains[T](s, contains_none), Option.none[T])
function[T0](x0: Set[T0], x1: Bool) { Option.none[T0] ∈ option_set[T0](x0, x1) = x1 }[T](s, contains_none)
function[T0](x0: Set[T0], x1: Bool, x2: T0) { Option.some[T0](x2) ∈ option_set[T0](x0, x1) = x2 ∈ x0 }[T](s, false, value)
function[T0](x0: Set[T0], x1: Bool, x2: T0) { Option.some[T0](x2) ∈ option_set[T0](x0, x1) = x2 ∈ x0 }[T](s, true, value)
function[T0](x0: Set[T0], x1: Bool) { Option.none[T0] ∈ option_set[T0](x0, x1) = x1 }[T](s, true)
function[T0, T2](x0: Option[T0], x1: T0 -> T2) { Option.none[T0] != x0 or option_map[T0, T2](x0, x1) = Option.none[T2] }[T, U](opt, f)
function[T0, T3](x0: T0, x1: Option[T0], x2: T0 -> T3) { Option.some[T0](x0) != x1 or option_map[T0, T3](x1, x2) = Option.some[T3](x2(x0)) }[T, U](value, opt, f)
(forall(x0: T) { not x0 ∈ source or f(x0) ∈ target } = true)
function(x0: T) { not (x0 ∈ source and not f(x0) ∈ target) }(value)
